appErrorBoundary.title: The app hit a rendering error
appErrorBoundary.body: Remote monitoring is not enabled in this build. Try again, or reopen the app later.

hero.title: Media Cleanup Suggestions
hero.description: Scan the whole library locally in batches, find duplicate, blurry, and similar photos, and clean safely through an app-level recycle bin.
hero.autoCleanupHint: Auto cleanup only performs soft delete, and risky actions always require a second confirmation.

info.title: MVP Detection Notes
info.firstLine: The current MVP scans the whole library and also keeps app-level recycle-bin entries visible. Detection stays fully on-device: blurry and similar items use local heuristic scoring, while duplicate media uses image thumbnail fingerprints plus duration-adaptive multi-frame video thumbnails and metadata similarity. Scanning advances in batches to keep memory usage and device heat under control.
info.secondLine: The recycle bin is an app-level soft-delete concept, not the system recycle bin. If the app is uninstalled or local storage is cleared, those records may be lost.

reminder.title: Recurring Cleanup Readiness
reminder.defaultSummary: Regularly review recent photos and videos, prioritizing duplicate, blurry, and similar media.
reminder.footnote: System notifications only remind you to reopen the app. They do not scan photos or videos in the background.
reminder.channelDescription: Reminds you to reopen the app, rescan recent media, and clean duplicate, blurry, and similar media.
reminder.noScanSummary: There is no recent scan yet. Open the app and finish one local scan before starting recurring cleanup.
reminder.noScanDetail: Keep both scanning and reminders local so photos and videos never have to be uploaded to the cloud.
reminder.eligibilityHint: Only triggers when new media exists within the last {{months}} month{{monthPluralSuffix}}.
reminder.recentScanFoundSummary: The last scan found {{candidateCount}} recognition results to review. Check again at {{time}}.
reminder.recentScanEmptySummary: The last scan found no obvious items to handle. Check the library again at {{time}}.
reminder.recentScanDetail: This scan checked {{scannedCount}} media items: {{highConfidenceCount}} suggested for cleanup, {{mediumConfidenceCount}} suggested for review, and {{recycleBinCount}} still waiting in keep & clean.

permission.title: Media permission required
permission.body: The MVP reads photo and video metadata and generates thumbnails locally for lightweight analysis. Nothing is uploaded to the cloud.

splash.title: Smart Album Manager
splash.subtitle: Detect duplicate, blurry, and similar media
splash.body: Scan and review duplicate, blurry, and similar items locally.
